verdict.summary: HIT. The models were already in a warning state on 2022-06-30, 1250 days before the event window opened on 2025-12-01. First warning: Altman Z 2.89 (Grey zone). The overall verdict on the last snapshot before the window (2025-09-30) was Distressed.
